Join the team

Work with RePass Cloud.

We hire engineers and collaborators who build real things — people who take ownership, communicate clearly, and care about the quality of what they ship.

Get in touch
What we're about

Engineering-led. Remote-friendly.

RePass Cloud is a software engineering consultancy focused on solving complex technical problems through code. Our engineers design and build automation systems, backend platforms, infrastructure tooling, and integrations for organisations that need reliable technical solutions.

We are a hybrid, digital-first team. Some of us are fully remote. Some work from offices nowhere near our Sydney head office. What we care about is output, not where you sit.

What we value
Build real things
We work on production systems that organisations depend on daily.
Own your work
Engineers own their areas end-to-end. No approval chains for obvious improvements.
Quality matters
We build for production, not for demos. Security and reliability are non-negotiable.
Output over optics
Remote and async-friendly. We judge on results, not visibility.
Open roles

Current opportunities

Open application

We don't always post open roles publicly. If you are a strong engineer interested in enterprise software, cloud automation, identity systems, or developer tooling — get in touch. Tell us what you build and why you're interested.

.NET Azure / AWS PowerShell Identity Infrastructure
Send us a message
Culture

How we work

Remote-first
We are distributed by default. Collaboration tools, async communication, and strong documentation are how we operate.
Engineering career paths
We support engineers who want to go deep technically. Management is not the only path forward here.
Security-minded team
Every team member thinks about security as part of their normal work, not as a separate checklist.
